findings.title: Operator ClusterRole grants wildcard verbs on security-sensitive resources including RBAC, SCCs, and core workloads
findings.evidence: rhods-operator-role grants * verbs on clusterrolebindings,clusterroles,rolebindings,roles, securitycontextconstraints, deployments, pods/exec, services, etc.

findings.title: Operator has unrestricted pods/exec permission enabling arbitrary code execution in any pod
findings.evidence: rhods-operator-role grants pods,pods/exec,pods/log: * at cluster scope

findings.title: Cluster-wide secrets access enables cross-namespace trust boundary violation
findings.evidence: rhods-operator-role grants secrets: create,delete,get,list,patch,update,watch at cluster scope

findings.title: Operator can modify its own admission webhooks, enabling self-bypass of validation
Operator can modify CRDs, enabling schema bypass and privilege escalation
Six webhook configurations have empty failurePolicy
findings.evidence: mdeployment.kb.io, mpod.kb.io, mjob.kb.io, vdeployment.kb.io, vpod.kb.io, vjob.kb.io have empty Fail Policy

findings.title: All webhook configurations show empty Resources and Operations preventing coverage verification
findings.evidence: Every webhook shows Resources: [] and Operations: [], cannot verify UPDATE coverage

findings.title: Operator can manage OAuthClients and users, enabling authentication bypass
findings.evidence: rhods-operator-role grants oauthclients: *, users: *, groups: * permissions

findings.title: Multiple webhook TLS certificates use Opaque type instead of kubernetes.io/tls
findings.evidence: kubeflow-training-operator-webhook-cert, kserve-webhook-server-cert, etc. use Opaque type

findings.title: CRD field definitions report 0 fields preventing validation gap analysis
findings.evidence: Every CRD shows Fields: 0, cannot assess URL/path/namespace field validation

findings.title: Empty controller watches blocking confused deputy analysis
findings.evidence: CONTROLLER WATCHES section shows only empty entries, preventing confused deputy pattern detection

findings.title: Duplicate SecurityContextConstraints permission entries suggest copy-paste RBAC accumulation
findings.evidence: securitycontextconstraints: * appears three times, deployments,replicasets: * appears multiple times
